title: Feedback - send a Other feedback without names/email
scenario: "Other" type feedback can be sent from App Settings > Feedback without providing a name or email
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Home screen.
Tap on App Settings (gear icon or settings entry).
Scroll down and tap on Feedback.
In the Feedback screen, tap on the "Other" option (or select it from the feedback type list).
Enter text in the feedback description field (leave Name and Email fields blank).
expected: Feedback is sent successfully without requiring a name or email address.
